creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
On 2013-06-17 21:30, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/ansible,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/179649 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/179649

Please update your ports tree. Ansible in ports is at version 1.2 right 
now and the master site has changed.
If you would still like to fetch version 1.1, you can find it here: 
http://ansibleworks.com/releases/

- Nikolai Lifanov
